content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed four source files changed in this diff. All 683 library tests pass. The changes are well-structured: (1) verify_bead_exists now distinguishes definitive bead-not-found from other non-zero exits, treating the latter as transient errors that propagate rather than silently degrading to stale warnings — this is a genuine correctness improvement. (2) success_reconciliation flush logic correctly avoids marking mappings as verified when the comment flush failed, preventing lost comments on replay. (3) milestone_record/service.rs correctly swallows NDJSON sidecar write failures since load_planned_elsewhere_mappings reads from the journal, not the sidecar. (4) final_review.rs voter/arbiter prompts now surface planned-elsewhere classification to voters. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
